dom_sanitizers.description: HTML/DOM sanitization libraries — breaks XSS chains

path_sanitizers.description: Path normalization — may prevent traversal (check if result is validated against allowlist)
path_sanitizers.note: path.join alone does NOT prevent traversal — must be combined with prefix check

url_validators.description: URL parsing and protocol validation — breaks open redirect and protocol handler attacks

context_isolation.description: Electron context isolation — prevents renderer from accessing Node.js directly

csp.description: Content Security Policy — restricts inline scripts, eval, and resource loading

input_validation.description: Type checking and validation libraries — narrows attacker input

ipc_sender_validation.description: IPC sender verification — ensures messages come from expected origin

sandbox.description: Renderer sandbox — limits OS-level access even if renderer is compromised
